_doc: SAM Pipeline Rules — ALL matching logic. Scripts MUST read from here, not hardcode.

weight_comparison.note: Do NOT use sam_unit from Blinkit (always '1' — useless)

variant_rejection.note: If SAM_weight / AM_weight outside this range, reject as wrong variant

price_sanity.note: If SAM SP > AM MRP * 3, reject as bulk/combo price

rules: sp_match_anakin (±5%) — only when unit is NOT confirmed mismatch
COMPLETE_MATCH.note: unit_match=None (unknown) does NOT default to True. If unit_match=False, ALWAYS PARTIAL.

rules: Item is LOOSE or ASM (check display_name + product_type)
unit TYPE must match (weight/volume/count) — values can differ
Product found but fails COMPLETE and SEMI COMPLETE criteria

stage1_pdp.description: Direct PDP visit using saved product_id/URL
stage1_pdp.input: product_mapping.json (our mapping) OR Anakin URLs as fallback

stage2_cascade.description: Brand-first cascade from BFS crawl pool

rules.ean: if both sides have barcode, must match

stage3.description: Broader matching with relaxed brand check

stage4_search.description: Search API based matching — MUST exist for ALL platforms

rules.brand_overlap: target brand words must appear in result

stage4_search.must_do: SAVE product_id after successful match to product_mapping.json

stage6_barcode.note: If both sides have barcode, must match exactly

product_mapping.note: This is our PERMANENT mapping. When Anakin is removed, this is all we have.

dont_do: NEVER default unit_match to True — use None for unknown
NEVER set MRP = SP as fallback — leave MRP as None if not found
NEVER accept price without weight check — variant mismatch is worse than no_price
NEVER depend only on Anakin URLs — build own product_mapping
NEVER skip search stage for any platform
NEVER trust DOM body text regex for Jiomart (carousel prices)
